question: How does Star color correlate with Temperature?

analysis.design_rationale: A boxplot allows detailed comparison of the temperature distribution for each Star color, revealing how the surface temperature (numerical variable) varies across the different observed color categories (categorical variable). This is effective for outlier detection, range comparison, and showing the correlation between star color and temperature based on their astronomy-driven relationship.
analysis.target_insight: The visualization reveals the central tendency, spread, and possible overlap among temperature ranges for each Star color, thus showing how each color groups stars by temperature.

chart_encodings.other_aesthetics: Box plots, variable color per box by category, rotated x-axis labels, adjusted figure for readability

transformations: Sort Star color categories by median Temperature (K) for improved interpretability
Group data by Star color and extract Temperature (K) values
data_preparation_steps: Compute median Temperature (K) for each Star color
Sort Star color categories ascending by median temperature for x-axis order
Prepare a list of Temperature (K) arrays (one per color) for plotting
suggestion.matplotlib_code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import matplotlib as mpl
df = pd.read_csv("csv_c_squared\192.csv")
medians = df.groupby("Star color")['Temperature (K)'].median().sort_values()
ordered_colors = medians.index.tolist()
data_to_plot = [df[df['Star color'] == c]['Temperature (K)'].values for c in ordered_colors]
cmap = mpl.colormaps['tab20']
color_map = [cmap(i/len(ordered_colors)) for i in range(len(ordered_colors))]
plt.figure(figsize=(13,6))
box = plt.boxplot(data_to_plot, patch_artist=True)
for patch, color in zip(box['boxes'], color_map):
    patch.set_facecolor(color)
plt.xticks(range(1, len(ordered_colors) + 1), ordered_colors, rotation=45, ha="right")
plt.ylabel("Temperature (K)")
plt.xlabel("Star color")
plt.title("Distribution of Star Temperature (K) by Star color\nSorted by median temperature", fontsize=14)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
